## Config

Paste only sanitized `.evidence.toml` values.

```toml
scheme = "ExampleApp"
bundle_id = "com.example.app"
simulator_udid = "SANITIZED"
```

## Public-Safety Check

Do not include secrets, private app data, customer information, or internal operational details.
